name: HWR_SOC_MED_ROLE_SCORE_B
description: This table stores the information related Social Media Role Score.

columns.Name: GBL_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This stores the Golbal Profile Id.

columns.Name: FUS_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This stores the Fusion Profile Id.

columns.Name: FUS_PRFL_ID#01
columns.Comments: This stores the Fusion Profile Id.

columns.Name: ROLE_ID_URI
columns.Comments: This stores the URI of the Role

columns.Name: IMPORTANCE
columns.Comments: This stores the information about the Importance of the score

columns.Name: PRECISION
columns.Comments: This stores the information about the precision of the score

columns.Name: SCORE_TIMESTAMP
columns.Comments: This stores the time of creation of the score

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
